g.onclick: sendPrompt('What types of geotechnical PDFs does GeoLLM ingest?')
sendPrompt('How should GeoLLM parse geotechnical PDFs? Text vs table vs image extraction?')
sendPrompt('What chunking strategy should GeoLLM use for geotechnical documents?')
sendPrompt('What metadata should be attached to each GeoLLM chunk?')
sendPrompt('How should narrative text sections of a geotechnical report be chunked?')
sendPrompt('How should SPT tables from boring logs be chunked for RAG?')
sendPrompt('How should lab test result tables be chunked for retrieval?')
sendPrompt('Should foundation recommendations be a separate chunk in GeoLLM RAG?')
sendPrompt('How should pile capacity calculation tables be stored for retrieval?')
sendPrompt('Which embedding model should GeoLLM use for geotechnical documents?')
sendPrompt('What vector database should GeoLLM use and how should it be structured?')
sendPrompt('Why does GeoLLM need a BM25 keyword index alongside vector search?')
sendPrompt('What kinds of queries will engineers ask GeoLLM?')
sendPrompt('How should GeoLLM route different query types to different retrieval strategies?')
sendPrompt('How does GeoLLM handle factual lookup queries about SPT values or soil descriptions?')
sendPrompt('How does GeoLLM handle cross-borehole comparison queries?')
sendPrompt('How does GeoLLM handle engineering calculation queries like pile capacity?')
sendPrompt('Should GeoLLM use a reranker and which one?')
sendPrompt('How should GeoLLM build the context window from retrieved chunks?')
sendPrompt('How does the GeoLLM Mistral model use retrieved context to answer?')
sendPrompt('What does a GeoLLM answer look like? Show me an example.')
